expected: Tasks with children by parentTaskId are treated as non-leaf summary rows even without mock customFields.kind or WBS conventions; unsafe leaf edits/drag are blocked for summary rows.
redEvidence: A live-style parent/child schedule-rows test was added; pre-fix test environment could not reach assertion because the helper imported React UI, so clean assertion RED was unavailable and recorded by the agent.
fixApplied: Schedule row mapping and UI tree operations now use parentTaskId parent-chain. Summary rows get rollups, collapse affordance, descendant filtering/deletion, disabled edit menu, and drag/edit guards.
limitations: Browser interaction traversal was not run in this slice.
regressionRisk: Medium. Tree semantics changed from WBS-prefix heuristics to parentTaskId; targeted tests and web typecheck pass.
